name: Zupa Migdalowa- Almond Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Almonds, blanched and finely ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk just to a simmer in a large saucepan.
2. Add all the ingredients; stir until well mixed.
Cook over low heat for 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Serve hot as is traditional for Christmas, or chill before serving.
